data.title: U.S. greenlights Nvidia AI chips for UAE and Saudi Arabia
data.description:
The Trump administration has approved sales of Nvidia’s most advanced AI chips to the UAE’s G42 and Saudi Arabia’s Humain.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-greenlights-nvidia-ai-chips-for-uae/

data.title: Significant Ethereum Transfers from SharpLink to Galaxy Digital OTC Wallets
data.description:
According to Odaily, blockchain analyst Yu Jin reported that 5,533 ETH, valued at $16.52 million, were transferred from the SharpLink address (0x70D...13E3) to the Galaxy Digital OTC wallet three hours ago.

Since early yesterday, a total of 10,975 ETH, worth $33.54 million, have been moved from SharpLink to Galaxy Digital.

data.title: SharpLink address transferred 5533 ETH to Galaxy Digital OTC wallet 3 hours ago.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, 5,533 ETH (worth $16.52 million) were transferred from the SharpLink address (0x70D...13E3) to the Galaxy Digital OTC wallet 3 hours ago. Since early yesterday morning, a total of 10,975 ETH (worth $33.54 million) has been transferred from the SharpLink address to Galaxy Digital.

data.title: 21Shares Solana Spot ETF Approved for Trading
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the 21Shares Solana Spot ETF has received official approval and is set to commence trading under the ticker symbol TSOL. The ETF will include a staking feature.

data.title: The 21Shares Solana ETF has been approved and is now available for trading.
data.description: 21shares US announced on its X platform that its Solana ETF has been officially approved and is now trading under the ticker symbol TSOL. Users can invest through banks or brokerage firms.

data.title: Samourai Wallet Co-Founder Sentenced for Money Laundering Involvement
data.description: According to BlockBeats, William Lonergan Hill, co-founder of the cryptocurrency mixer Samourai Wallet, has been sentenced to four years in prison by the U.S. District Court in Manhattan. Hill was found guilty of assisting in laundering over $200 million and participating in illegal dark web transactions. The sentencing took place on Wednesday, highlighting the ongoing legal actions against individuals involved in cryptocurrency-related crimes.

data.title: Base Head Jesse Pollak: $Jesse tokens will be launched on Base.
data.description: Base's head, Jesse, posted on the X platform that $jesse will be launched on Base from his account jesse.base.eth. He anticipates attempts to impersonate him and $jesse before and after the launch. All updates regarding $jesse will be released directly through his X platform and the Base App; users should be wary of any information from unofficial sources.

data.title: Analysts: Nvidia's strong earnings boost market confidence
data.description: Sam Stovall, chief investment strategist at CFRA Research, said, "Nvidia just hit a home run. This will give investors a sigh of relief, as current and anticipated continued growth suggests that its valuation may not be as inflated as previously feared." David Trainer, CEO of investment research firm New Constructs, added, "This is exactly the kind of boost the market needs. However, I would like to remind everyone that all the positive news is already fully priced into the current share price." (Jinshi)

data.title: Better-than-expected Q3 earnings from Nvidia boosted Bitcoin mining stocks in after-hours trading, with Cipher Mining rising over 13%.
data.description: According to The Block, GPU manufacturer Nvidia reported strong third-quarter earnings, with revenue reaching $57 billion, and its fourth-quarter revenue guidance ($63.7 billion to $66.3 billion) far exceeded the market consensus expectation of $61.98 billion. This positive news spurred a rebound in the cryptocurrency market and related stocks in after-hours trading on Wednesday. Bitcoin prices recovered to around $91,000. In after-hours trading on the US stock market, Bitcoin mining companies generally saw their share prices rise, with Cipher Mining leading the gains at over 13%, followed by IREN at approximately 10%, and Bitfarms, TeraWulf, and CleanSpark following closely behind. MARA, the largest mining company by market capitalization, rose 4%. It's worth noting that with the surge in AI demand, some mining companies are shifting their focus to AI/HPC infrastructure businesses; for example, IREN recently signed a cloud service agreement with Microsoft.

data.title: Trump’s World Liberty Financial burns $22M in compromised WLFI tokens
data.description:
World Liberty Financial executed an emergency smart contract function recently, burning 166. 667 million WLFI tokens worth $22. 14 million from compromised addresses and reallocating them to secure recovery wallets.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/trumps-world-liberty-financial-burns-22m-in-compromised-wlfi-tokens/

data.title: COINBASE: ASTER spot trading will launch on November 20, 2025.
data.description: COINBASE New Addition: Spot trading of Aster (ASTER) will launch on November 20, 2025. In regions where trading is supported, the ASTER-USD trading pair will open at or after 9:00 AM Pacific Time, provided liquidity conditions are met.

data.title: BlackRock registers iShares Ethereum-Staked ETF in Delaware
data.description: According to Theblock, BlackRock filed a company name registration document in Delaware on Wednesday (November 19th) registering the name for the iShares Staked Ethereum Trust ETF. Back in July, Nasdaq filed an updated 19b-4 document with the U.S. SEC, seeking to add staking functionality to its existing iShares Ethereum Trust (ETHA). The fund (ETHA) is currently the largest Ethereum ETF in terms of assets under management, with total holdings of nearly $11.5 billion.

data.title: Senators grill crypto regulator Michael Selig in high-stakes bid to lead CFTC
data.description:
Michael Selig, a top SEC crypto official, faced tough questioning in the Senate as he seeks to become the next chairman of the CFTC.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/selig-grilled-in-bid-to-lead-cftc/

data.title: U.S. Newborns to Receive Government Stock Market Investment Accounts Under New Bill
data.description:
U. S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says every American child born over the next three years will receive a government-funded investment account designed to grow with the stock market, as part of the recently enacted One Big Beautiful Bill. In a televised interview, Bessent explained that the initiative aims to give the next generation early exposure […] The post U
source: https://www.ethnews.com/u-s-newborns-to-receive-government-stock-market-investment-accounts-under-new-bill/
